\"%name%\" already exists in the library: "%name%" ужо існуе ў бібліятэцы, ён будзе перазапісаны пры захаванні.

<code>json_encode()</code> must be avail: json_encode() павінен быць даступны. Усталюйце і ўключыце JSON пашырэнне.
2 Column Grid (Meta only): Сетка з 2 слупкоў (Толькі для Мета апісання)
A higher memory limit is recommended. Se: Рэкамендуецца большы ліміт памяці. Усталюйце memory_limit на 128M у канфігурацыі PHP.
A higher upload limit is recommended. Se: Рэкамендуецца большы ліміт загрузкі. Усталюйце post_max_size на 8M у канфігурацыі PHP.
Рэкамендуецца большы ліміт загрузкі. Усталюйце upload_max_filesize на 8M у канфігурацыі PHP.
Add a comma-separated list of font weigh: Add a comma-separated list of font weights to load, e.g. 300, 400, 600. Look up available variants at Google Fonts.
Add a parallax effect or fix the backgro: Add a parallax effect or fix the background with regard to the viewport while scrolling.
Add a stepless parallax animation based: Add a stepless parallax animation based on the scroll position.
Add custom CSS or Less to your site. All: Add custom CSS or Less to your site. All Less theme variables and mixins are available. The <style> tag is not needed.
Add custom JavaScript to your site. The: Add custom JavaScript to your site. The <script> tag is not needed.
Add custom JavaScript which sets cookies: Add custom JavaScript which sets cookies. It will be loaded after consent is given. The <script> tag is not needed.
Add extra margin to the button.
Add multiple stops to define start, inte: Add multiple stops to define start, intermediate and end colors along the animation sequence. Optionally, specify percentage to position the stops along the animation sequence.
Add multiple stops to define start, intermediate and end opacity along the animation sequence. Optionally, specify percentage to position the stops along the animation sequence.
Add text after the content field.
Add text before the content field.
Align dropdowns to their menu item or th: Align dropdowns to their menu item or the navbar. Optionally, show them in a full-width section called dropbar, display an icon to indicate dropdowns and let text items open by click and not hover.
Align the image to the left or right.
Align the image to the top or place it b: Align the image to the top or place it between the title and the content.
Align the image to the top, left, right: Align the image to the top, left, right or place it between the title and the content.
Align the section content vertically, if: Align the section content vertically, if the section height is larger than the content itself.
Align the title and meta text as well as: Align the title and meta text as well as the continue reading button.
Align the title and meta text.
Align the title to the top or left in re: Align the title to the top or left in regards to the content.
All images are licensed under <a href='h: All images are licensed under Creative Commons Zero which means you can copy, modify, distribute and use the images for free, including commercial purposes, without asking permission.
Animate properties to specific values. A: Animate properties to specific values. Add multiple stops to define start, intermediate and end values along the animation sequence for each property. Optionally, specify percentage to position the stops along the animation sequence. Translate and scale can have optional %, vw and vh units.

Animate properties to specific values. Add multiple stops to define start, intermediate and end values along the animation sequence. Optionally, specify percentage to position the stops along the animation sequence. Translate can have optional %, vw and vh units.
Any Joomla module can be displayed in yo: Any Joomla module can be displayed in your custom layout.
Any WordPress widget can be displayed in: Any WordPress widget can be displayed in your custom layout.
Apply a margin between the navigation an: Apply a margin between the navigation and the slideshow container.
Apply a margin between the overlay and t: Apply a margin between the overlay and the image container.
Apply a margin between the slidenav and: Apply a margin between the slidenav and the slider container.
Apply a margin between the slidenav and the slideshow container.
Apply an animation to elements once they: Apply an animation to elements once they enter the viewport. Slide animations can come into effect with a fixed offset or at 100% of the element size.
Attach the image to the drop's edge.
Author: Аўтар
Blend the element with the page content.
Bootstrap is only required when default: Bootstrap is only required when default Joomla template files are loaded, for example for the Joomla frontend editing. Load jQuery to write custom code based on the jQuery JavaScript library.
By default, fields of related sources wi: By default, fields of related sources with single items are available for mapping. Select a related source which has multiple items to map its fields.
By default, images are loaded lazy. Enab: By default, images are loaded lazy. Enable eager loading for images in the initial viewport.
By default, only uncategorized articles: By default, only uncategorized articles are referred as pages. Alternatively, define articles from a specific category as pages.
By default, only uncategorized articles are referred as pages. Change the category in the advanced settings.
Caption: Caption
Categories are only loaded from the sele: Categories are only loaded from the selected parent category.
Center grid columns horizontally and row: Center grid columns horizontally and rows vertically.
Center the title and meta text: Center the title and meta text
Center the title, meta text and button: Center the title, meta text and button
Center, left and right alignment may dep: Center, left and right alignment may depend on a breakpoint and require a fallback.
Choose between a navigation that shows f: Choose between a navigation that shows filter controls separately in single dropdowns or a toggle button that shows all filters in a dropdown or an offcanvas dialog.
Choose between a parallax depending on t: Choose between a parallax depending on the scroll position or an animation, which is applied once the slide is active.
Choose between a vertical or horizontal: Choose between a vertical or horizontal list.
Choose between an attached bar or a noti: Choose between an attached bar or a notification.
Choose between the previous/next or nume: Choose between the previous/next or numeric pagination. The numeric pagination is not available for single articles.
Choose between the previous/next or numeric pagination. The numeric pagination is not available for single posts.
Choose products of the current page or q: Choose products of the current page or query custom products.
Choose the page to which the template is: Choose the page to which the template is assigned.
Clear cached images and assets. Images t: Clear cached images and assets. Images that need to be resized are stored in the theme's cache folder. After reuploading an image with the same name, you'll have to clear the cache.
Click on the pencil to pick an icon from: Click on the pencil to pick an icon from the icon library.
Create a gap-free masonry layout if grid: Create a gap-free masonry layout if grid items have different heights. Pack items into columns with the most room or show them in their natural order. Optionally, use a parallax animation to move columns while scrolling until they justify at the bottom.
Create a general layout for the live sea: Create a general layout for the live search results. Start with a new layout and choose from a collection of ready-to-use elements or browse the layout library and start with one of the pre-built layouts.
Create a general layout for this page ty: Create a general layout for this page type. Start with a new layout and choose from a collection of ready-to-use elements or browse the layout library and start with one of the pre-built layouts.
Create a layout for the footer section o: Create a layout for the footer section of all pages. Start with a new layout and choose from a collection of ready-to-use elements or browse the layout library and start with one of the pre-built layouts.
Create a layout for the menu item dropdo: Create a layout for the menu item dropdown. Start with a new layout and choose from a collection of ready-to-use elements or browse the layout library and start with one of the pre-built layouts.
Create a layout for this module and publ: Create a layout for this module and publish it in the top or bottom position. Start with a new layout and choose from a collection of ready-to-use elements or browse the layout library and start with one of the pre-built layouts.
Create a layout for this widget and publ: Create a layout for this widget and publish it in the top or bottom area. Start with a new layout and choose from a collection of ready-to-use elements or browse the layout library and start with one of the pre-built layouts.
Create a layout. Start with a new layout: Create a layout. Start with a new layout and choose from a collection of ready-to-use elements or browse the layout library and start with one of the pre-built layouts.
Create an individual layout for the curr: Create an individual layout for the current page. Start with a new layout and choose from a collection of ready-to-use elements or browse the layout library and start with one of the pre-built layouts.
Create site-wide templates for pages and: Create site-wide templates for pages and load their content dynamically into the layout.
Customize the column widths of the selec: Customize the column widths of the selected layout and set the column order. Changing the layout will reset all customizations.
Decorate the headline with a divider, bu: Decorate the headline with a divider, bullet or a line that is vertically centered to the heading.
Decorate the title with a divider, bulle: Decorate the title with a divider, bullet or a line that is vertically centered to the heading.
Define a background style or an image of: Define a background style or an image of a column and set the vertical alignment for its content.
Define a custom background color or a co: Вызначце ўласны колер фону альбо анімацыю колеравага паралакса замест выкарыстання перадустаноўленага стылю.
Define a name to easily identify the tem: Define a name to easily identify the template.
Define a name to easily identify this el: Define a name to easily identify this element inside the builder.
Define a navigation menu or give it no s: Define a navigation menu or give it no semantic meaning.
Define a unique identifier for the eleme: Define a unique identifier for the element.
Define an alignment fallback for device: Define an alignment fallback for device widths below the breakpoint.
Define one or more attributes for the el: Define one or more attributes for the element. Separate attribute name and value by = character. One attribute per line.
Define one or more class names for the e: Define one or more class names for the element. Separate multiple classes with spaces.
Define the alignment in case the contain: Define the alignment in case the container exceeds the element max-width.
Define the alignment of the last table c: Define the alignment of the last table column.
Define the device width from which the a: Define the device width from which the alignment will apply.
Define the device width from which the d: Define the device width from which the dropnav will be shown.
Define the device width from which the m: Define the device width from which the max-width will apply.
Define the filter fallback mode for devi: Define the filter fallback mode for device widths below the breakpoint.
Define the image quality in percent for:
Define the image quality in percent for generated JPG images and when converting JPEG and PNG to next-gen image formats.

Mind that setting the image quality too high will have a negative impact on page loading times.

Press the Clear Cache button in the advanced settings after changing the image quality.
Define the layout of the form.
Define the layout of the title, meta and: Define the layout of the title, meta and content.
Define the order of the table cells.
Define the origin of the element's trans: Define the origin of the element's transformation when scaling or rotating the element.
Define the padding between table rows.
Define the purpose and structure of the: Define the purpose and structure of the content or give it no semantic meaning.
Define the title position within the sec: Define the title position within the section.
Define the width of the content cell.
Define the width of the filter navigatio: Define the width of the filter navigation. Choose between percent and fixed widths or expand columns to the width of their content.
Define the width of the image within the: Define the width of the image within the grid. Choose between percent and fixed widths or expand columns to the width of their content.
Define the width of the meta cell.
Define the width of the navigation. Choo: Define the width of the navigation. Choose between percent and fixed widths or expand columns to the width of their content.
Define the width of the title cell.
Define the width of the title within the: Define the width of the title within the grid.
Define the width of the title within the grid. Choose between percent and fixed widths or expand columns to the width of their content.
Define whether the width of the slider i: Define whether the width of the slider items is fixed or automatically expanded by its content widths.
Define whether thumbnails wrap into mult: Define whether thumbnails wrap into multiple lines if the container is too small.
Delay the element animations in millisec: Delay the element animations in milliseconds, e.g. 200.
Determine how the image or video will bl: Determine how the image or video will blend with the background color.
Determine how the image will blend with: Determine how the image will blend with the background color.
Determine whether the image will fit the: Determine whether the image will fit the page dimensions by clipping it or by filling the empty areas with the background color.
Determine whether the image will fit the section dimensions by clipping it or by filling the empty areas with the background color.
Disable autoplay, start autoplay immedia: Disable autoplay, start autoplay immediately or as soon as the video enters the viewport.
Disable the wpautop filter for the_content and the_excerpt and disable conversion of Emoji characters to images.
Disable the element and publish it later: Disable the element and publish it later.
Disable the item and publish it later.
Disable the row and publish it later.
Disable the section and publish it later: Disable the section and publish it later.
Disable the template and publish it late: Адключыць шаблон і апублікаваць яго пазней.
Display a divider between sidebar and co: Display a divider between sidebar and content
Display a menu by selecting the position: Display a menu by selecting the position in which it should appear. For example, publish the main menu in the navbar position and an alternative menu in the mobile position.
Display a search icon on the left or rig: Display a search icon on the left or right of the input field. The icon on the right can be clicked to submit the search.
Display a search icon on the left or right. The icon on the right can be clicked to submit the search.
Display the cart quantity in brackets or: Display the cart quantity in brackets or as a badge.
Display the content inside the overlay,: Display the content inside the overlay, as the lightbox caption or both.
Display the content inside the panel, as: Display the content inside the panel, as the lightbox caption or both.
Display the excerpt field if it has cont: Display the excerpt field if it has content, otherwise the content. To use an excerpt field, create a custom field with the name excerpt.
Display the first letter of the paragrap: Display the first letter of the paragraph as a large initial.
Display the image only on this device wi: Display the image only on this device width and larger.
Display the image or video only on this: Display the image or video only on this device width and larger.
Display the map controls and define whet: Display the map controls and define whether the map can be zoomed or dragged using the mouse wheel or touch.
Display the meta text in a sentence or a: Display the meta text in a sentence or a horizontal list.
Display the module only from this device: Display the module only from this device width and larger.
Display the navigation only on this devi: Display the navigation only on this device width and larger.
Display the parallax effect only on this: Display the parallax effect only on this device width and larger.
Display the popover on click or hover.
Display the section title on the defined: Display the section title on the defined screen size and larger.
Display the short or long description.
Display the slidenav only on this device: Display the slidenav only on this device width and larger.
Display the slidenav outside only on thi: Display the slidenav outside only on this device width and larger. Otherwise, display it inside.
Display the title in the same line as th: Display the title in the same line as the content.
Display the title inside the overlay, as: Display the title inside the overlay, as the lightbox caption or both.
Display the title inside the panel, as t: Display the title inside the panel, as the lightbox caption or both.
Display the widget only from this device: Display the widget only from this device width and larger.
Do you really want to replace the curren: Do you really want to replace the current layout?

Don't collapse the column if dynamically: Don't collapse the column if dynamically loaded content is empty.
Enable a navigation to move to the previ: Enable a navigation to move to the previous or next post.
Enable autoplay or play a muted inline v: Enable autoplay or play a muted inline video without controls.
Enable click mode on text items: Enable click mode on text items
Enter a comma-separated list of tags to: Enter a comma-separated list of tags to manually order the filter navigation.
Enter a comma-separated list of tags, fo: Enter a comma-separated list of tags, for example, blue, white, black.
Enter a date for the countdown to expire: Enter a date for the countdown to expire.
Enter a decorative section title which i: Enter a decorative section title which is aligned to the section edge.
Enter a descriptive text label to make i: Enter a descriptive text label to make it accessible if the link has no visible text.
Enter a subtitle that will be displayed: Enter a subtitle that will be displayed beneath the nav item.
Enter a table header text for the conten: Enter a table header text for the content column.
Enter a table header text for the image: Enter a table header text for the image column.
Enter a table header text for the link c: Enter a table header text for the link column.
Enter a table header text for the meta c: Enter a table header text for the meta column.
Enter a table header text for the title: Enter a table header text for the title column.
Enter a width for the popover in pixels.
Enter an optional text for the title att: Enter an optional text for the title attribute of the link, which will appear on hover.
Enter labels for the countdown time.
Enter link to your social profile. A cor: Enter link to your social profile. A corresponding UIkit brand icon will be displayed automatically, if available. Links to email addresses and phone numbers, like mailto:info@example.com or tel:+491570156, are also supported.
Enter or pick a link, an image or a vide: Enter or pick a link, an image or a video file.
Enter the API key in Settings > External: Увядзіце ключ API у раздзеле Налады > Знешнія сэрвісы.
Enter the API key to enable 1-click upda: Enter the API key to enable 1-click updates for YOOtheme Pro and to access the layout library as well as the Unsplash image library. You can create an API Key for this website in your Account settings.
Enter the cookie consent message. The de: Enter the cookie consent message. The default text serves as illustration. Please adjust it according to the cookie laws of your country.
Enter the horizontal position of the mar: Enter the horizontal position of the marker in percent.
Enter the replacement string which may c: Enter the replacement string which may contain references. If left empty, the search matches will be removed.
Enter the text for the button.
Enter the text for the home link.
Enter the text for the link.
Enter the vertical position of the marke: Enter the vertical position of the marker in percent.

Expand columns equally to always fill re: Expand columns equally to always fill remaining space within the row, center them or align them to the left.
Expand the height of the content to fill: Expand the height of the content to fill the available space in the overlay and push the link to the bottom.
Expand the height of the content to fill the available space in the panel and push the link to the bottom.
Expand the height of the element to fill: Expand the height of the element to fill the available space in the column or force the height to one viewport. The image will cover the element's content box.
Expand the height of the element to fill the available space in the column or force the height to one viewport. The video will cover the element's content box.
Expand the height of the element to fill the available space in the column.
Expand the height of the image to fill t: Expand the height of the image to fill the available space in the item.
Expand the width of one side to the left: Expand the width of one side to the left or right while the other side keeps within the constraints of the max width.
Export all theme settings and import the: Export all theme settings and import them into another installation. This doesn't include content from the layout, style and element libraries or the template builder.
Extend all content items to the same hei: Extend all content items to the same height.
Filter %post_types% by authors. Use the: Filter %post_types% by authors. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple authors. Set the logical operator to match or not match the selected authors.
Filter %post_types% by terms. Use the <k: Filter %post_types% by terms. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple terms. Set the logical operator to match at least one of the terms, none of the terms or all terms.
Filter articles by authors. Use the <kbd: Filter articles by authors. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple authors. Set the logical operator to match or not match the selected authors.
Filter articles by categories. Use the <: Filter articles by categories. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple categories. Set the logical operator to match or not match the selected categories.
Filter articles by featured status. Load: Filter articles by featured status. Load all articles, featured articles only, or articles which are not featured.
Filter articles by tags. Use the <kbd>sh: Filter articles by tags. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple tags. Set the logical operator to match at least one of the tags, none of the tags or all tags.
Filter items visually by the selected po: Filter items visually by the selected post types.
Filter items visually by the selected ro: Filter items visually by the selected root categories.
Filter products by attribute using the a: Filter products by attribute using the attribute slug.
Filter products by categories using a co: Filter products by categories using a comma-separated list of category slugs.
Filter products by tags using a comma-se: Filter products by tags using a comma-separated list of tag slugs.
Filter products by terms of the chosen a: Filter products by terms of the chosen attribute using a comma-separated list of attribute term slugs.
Filter products using a comma-separated: Filter products using a comma-separated list of IDs.
Filter products using a comma-separated list of SKUs.
Fix the background with regard to the vi: Fix the background with regard to the viewport.
Force a light or dark color for text, bu: Force a light or dark color for text, buttons and controls on the image or video background.
Group items into sets. The number of ite: Group items into sets. The number of items within a set depends on the defined item width, e.g. 33% means that each set contains 3 items.
Heading: Heading
Headline: Headline
Headline styles differ in font size and: Headline styles differ in font size and font family.
Highlight the item as the active item.
If a section or row has a max width, and: If a section or row has a max width, and one side is expanding to the left or right, the default padding can be removed from the expanding side.
If multiple templates are assigned to th: If multiple templates are assigned to the same view, the template which appears first is applied. Change the order with drag and drop.
If you are creating a multilingual site,: If you are creating a multilingual site, do not select a specific menu here. Instead, use the Joomla module manager to publish the right menu depending on the current language.
If you are using WPML, you can not selec: If you are using WPML, you can not select a menu here. Instead, use the WordPress menu manager to assign menus to locations for a language.
Images can't be cached. <a href=\"https:: Images can't be cached. Change the permissions of the cache folder in the yootheme theme directory, so that the web server can write into it.
Inject SVG images into the markup so the: Inject SVG images into the markup so they adopt the text color automatically.
Inject SVG images into the page markup s: Inject SVG images into the page markup so that they can easily be styled with CSS.
Instead of opening a link, display an al: Instead of opening a link, display an alternative content in a modal or an offcanvas sidebar.
Instead of using a custom image, you can: Instead of using a custom image, you can click on the pencil to pick an icon from the icon library.
Inverse on hover or when active: Inverse on hover or when active
Inverse the text color on hover: Inverse the text color on hover
Label: Label
Landscape and portrait images are center: Landscape and portrait images are centered within the grid cells. Width and height will be flipped when images are resized.
Limit the content length to a number of: Limit the content length to a number of characters. All HTML elements will be stripped.
Link the image if a link exists.
Link the title if a link exists.
Link the whole card if a link exists.
Link the whole overlay if a link exists.
Link the whole panel if a link exists. O: Link the whole panel if a link exists. Optionally, add a hover style.
Link the whole slideshow instead of link: Link the whole slideshow instead of linking items separately.
Link to redirect to after submit.
Load jQuery to write custom code based o: Load jQuery to write custom code based on the jQuery JavaScript library.
Make the column or its elements sticky o: Make the column or its elements sticky only from this device width and larger.
Make the header transparent and overlay: Make the header transparent and overlay this section if it directly follows the header.
Make the header transparent even when it: Make the header transparent even when it's sticky.
Match the height of all modules which ar: Match the height of all modules which are styled as a card.
Match the height of all widgets which ar: Match the height of all widgets which are styled as a card.
Maximum zoom level of the map.
Menu items are only loaded from the sele: Menu items are only loaded from the selected parent item.
Message shown to the user after submit.
Mind that a template with a general layo: Mind that a template with a general layout is assigned to the current page. Edit the template to update its layout.
Minimum zoom level of the map.
Move the sidebar to the left of the cont: Move the sidebar to the left of the content
Multibyte encoded strings such as UTF-8: Multibyte encoded strings such as UTF-8 can't be processed. Install and enable the Multibyte String extension.
Name: Назва
No font found. Press enter if you are ad: No font found. Press enter if you are adding a custom font.
No image library is available to process: No image library is available to process images. Install and enable the GD extension.
On short pages, the main section can be: On short pages, the main section can be expanded to fill the viewport. This only applies to pages which are not build with the page builder.
Only display modules that are published: Only display modules that are published and visible on this page.
Only display widgets that are published: Only display widgets that are published and visible on this page.
Only load menu items from the selected m: Only load menu items from the selected menu heading.
Only post types with an archive can be r: Only post types with an archive can be redirected to the archive page.
Only search the selected post types.
Only show the image or icon.
Only single pages and posts can have ind: Only single pages and posts can have individual layouts. Use a template to apply a general layout to this page type.
Open dropdowns on click instead of hover: Open dropdowns on click instead of hover and align dropdowns to the filter bar instead of their item.
Open the link in a new window: Open the link in a new window
Order the filter navigation alphabetical: Order the filter navigation alphabetically or by defining the order manually.
Override the section animation setting. This option won't have any effect unless animations are enabled for this section.
Pick a %post_type% manually or use filte: Pick a %post_type% manually or use filter options to specify which %post_type% should be loaded dynamically.
Pick an alternative icon from the icon l: Pick an alternative icon from the icon library.
Pick an alternative SVG image from the m: Pick an alternative SVG image from the media manager.
Pick an article manually or use filter o: Pick an article manually or use filter options to specify which article should be loaded dynamically.
Pick an optional icon from the icon libr: Pick an optional icon from the icon library.
Please install/enable the <a href=\"inde: Please install/enable the installer plugin to enable this feature.
Please provide a valid email address.
Position the element above or below othe: Position the element above or below other elements. If they have the same stack level, the position depends on the order in the layout.
Position the element in the normal conte: Position the element in the normal content flow, or in normal flow but with an offset relative to itself, or remove it from the flow and position it relative to the containing column.
Position the filter navigation at the to: Position the filter navigation at the top, left or right. A larger style can be applied to left and right navigation.
Position the meta text above or below th: Position the meta text above or below the title.
Position the navigation at the top, bott: Position the navigation at the top, bottom, left or right. A larger style can be applied to left and right navigations.
Preserve the text color, for example whe: Preserve the text color, for example when using cards. Section overlap is not supported by all styles and may have no visual effect.
Prevent form submit if live search is us: Prevent form submit if live search is used
Preview all UI components: Перадпрагляд усіх кампанентаў для карыстальніка інтэрфейсу
Render the intro text if the read more t: Render the intro text if the read more tag is present. Otherwise, fall back to the full content. Optionally, prefer the excerpt field over the intro text.

Render the intro text if the read more tag is present. Otherwise, fall back to the full content. Optionally, prefer the excerpt field over the intro text. To use an excerpt field, create a custom field with the name excerpt.
Rotate the title 90 degrees clockwise or: Rotate the title 90 degrees clockwise or counterclockwise.
Select a child theme. Note that differen: Select a child theme. Note that different template files will be loaded, and theme settings will be updated respectively. To create a child theme, add a new folder yootheme_NAME in the templates directory, for example yootheme_mytheme.
Select a content source to make its fiel: Select a content source to make its fields available for mapping. Choose between sources of the current page or query a custom source.
Select a different position for this ite: Select a different position for this item.
Select a Joomla module position that wil: Select a Joomla module position that will render all published modules. It's recommended to use the builder-1 to -6 positions, which are not rendered elsewhere by the theme.
Select a logo, which will be shown in of: Select a logo, which will be shown in offcanvas and modal dialogs of certain header layouts.
Select a predefined date format or enter: Select a predefined date format or enter a custom format.
Select a predefined meta text style, inc: Select a predefined meta text style, including color, size and font-family.
Select a predefined search pattern or en: Select a predefined search pattern or enter a custom string or regular expression to search for. The regular expression has to be enclosed between slashes. For example `my-string` or `/ab+c/`.
Select a predefined text style, includin: Select a predefined text style, including color, size and font-family.
Select a style for the continue reading: Select a style for the continue reading button.
Select a style for the overlay.
Select a taxonomy to only load posts fro: Select a taxonomy to only load posts from the same term.
Select a taxonomy to only navigate betwe: Select a taxonomy to only navigate between posts from the same term.
Select a transition for the content when: Select a transition for the content when the overlay appears on hover or when active.
Select a transition for the content when the overlay appears on hover.
Select a transition for the link when th: Select a transition for the link when the overlay appears on hover or when active.
Select a transition for the link when the overlay appears on hover.
Select a transition for the meta text wh: Select a transition for the meta text when the overlay appears on hover or when active.
Select a transition for the meta text when the overlay appears on hover.
Select a transition for the overlay when: Select a transition for the overlay when it appears on hover or when active.
Select a transition for the overlay when it appears on hover.
Select a transition for the title when t: Select a transition for the title when the overlay appears on hover or when active.
Select a transition for the title when the overlay appears on hover.
Select a video file or enter a link from: Select a video file or enter a link from YouTube or Vimeo.
Select a WordPress widget area that will: Select a WordPress widget area that will render all published widgets. It's recommended to use the builder-1 to -6 widget areas, which are not rendered elsewhere by the theme.
Select an alternative font family. Mind: Выберыце альтэрнатыўнае сямейства шрыфтоў. Майце на ўвазе, што не ўсе стылі маюць розныя семяйствы шрыфтоў.
Select an alternative logo with inversed: Select an alternative logo with inversed color, e.g. white, for better visibility on dark backgrounds. It will be displayed automatically, if needed.
Select an alternative logo, which will b: Select an alternative logo, which will be used on small devices.
Select an animation that will be applied: Select an animation that will be applied to the content items when filtering between them.
Select an animation that will be applied to the content items when toggling between them.
Select an image transition. If the hover: Select an image transition. If the hover image is set, the transition takes place between the two images. If None is selected, the hover image fades in.
Select an optional <code>favicon.svg</co: Выберыце неабавязковы значок favicon.svg. Сучасныя браўзеры будуць выкарыстоўваць яго замест выдарыса ў фармаце PNG. Выкарыстоўвайце CSS каб пераключыць колеравую схему SVG для яснага / цёмнага рэжыму.
Select an optional image that appears on: Select an optional image that appears on hover.
Select an optional image which shows up: Select an optional image which shows up until the video plays. If not selected, the first video frame is shown as the poster frame.
Select an optional video that appears on: Select an optional video that appears on hover.
Select menu items manually. Use the <kbd: Select menu items manually. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple menu items.
Select one of the boxed card or tile sty: Select one of the boxed card or tile styles or a blank panel.
Select the animation on how the dropbar: Select the animation on how the dropbar appears below the navbar.
Select the breakpoint from which the col: Select the breakpoint from which the column will start to appear before other columns. On smaller screen sizes, the column will appear in the natural order.
Select the color of the list markers.
Select the device size where the default: Select the device size where the default header will be replaced by the mobile header.
Select the filter navigation style. The: Select the filter navigation style. The pill and divider styles are only available for horizontal Subnavs.
Select the image box decoration style.
Select the image box shadow size on hove: Select the image box shadow size on hover.
Select the image box shadow size.
Select the layout for the <code>dialog-m: Select the layout for the dialog-mobile position. Pushed items of the position are shown as ellipsis.
Select the layout for the <code>dialog</: Select the layout for the dialog position. Items which can be pushed are shown as ellipsis.
Select the layout for the <code>logo-mob: Select the layout for the logo-mobile, navbar-mobile and header-mobile positions.
Select the layout for the <code>logo</co: Select the layout for the logo, navbar and header positions. Some layouts can split or push items of a position which are shown as ellipsis.
Select the list to subscribe to.
Select the logical operator for the attr: Select the logical operator for the attribute term comparison. Match at least one of the terms, none of the terms or all terms.
Select the logical operator for the cate: Select the logical operator for the category comparison. Match at least one of the categories, none of the categories or all categories.
Select the logical operator for the tag: Select the logical operator for the tag comparison. Match at least one of the tags, none of the tags or all tags.
Select the marker of the list items.
Select the navigation type. The pill and: Select the navigation type. The pill and divider styles are only available for horizontal Subnavs.
Select the overlay or content position.

Select the position of the navigation.
Select the position of the slidenav.
Select the position that will display th: Select the position that will display the search.

Select the position that will display the social icons. Be sure to add your social profile links or no icons can be displayed.

Select the style for the code syntax hig: Select the style for the code syntax highlighting. Use GitHub for light and Monokai for dark backgrounds.
Select the style for the overlay.
Select the SVG color. It will only apply: Select the SVG color. It will only apply to supported elements defined in the SVG.

Select the text color. If the background: Select the text color. If the background option is selected, styles that don't apply a background image use the primary color instead.
Select the title style and add an option: Select the title style and add an optional colon at the end of the title.
Select the transformation origin for the: Select the transformation origin for the Ken Burns animation.
Select the transition between two slides: Select the transition between two slides.
Select the video box decoration style.
Select the video box shadow size.
Select whether a button or a clickable i: Select whether a button or a clickable icon inside the email input is shown.
Select whether a message will be shown o: Select whether a message will be shown or the site will be redirected after clicking the subscribe button.
Select whether the default Search or Sma: Select whether the default Search or Smart Search is used by the search module and builder element.
Select whether the modules should be ali: Select whether the modules should be aligned side by side or stacked above each other.
Select whether the widgets should be ali: Select whether the widgets should be aligned side by side or stacked above each other.
Select your <code>apple-touch-icon.png</: Select your apple-touch-icon.png. It appears when the website is added to the home screen on iOS devices. The recommended size is 180x180 pixels.
Select your <code>favicon.png</code>. It: Select your favicon.png. It appears in the browser's address bar, tab and bookmarks. The recommended size is 96x96 pixels.
Select your logo. Optionally inject an S: Select your logo. Optionally inject an SVG logo into the markup so it adopts the text color automatically.
Serve optimized image formats with bette: Serve optimized image formats with better compression and quality than JPEG and PNG.
Set a condition to display the element o: Set a condition to display the element or its item depending on the content of a field.
Set a different link ARIA label for this: Set a different link ARIA label for this item.
Set a different link text for this item.
Set a different text color for this item: Set a different text color for this item.
Set a fixed height for all columns. They: Set a fixed height for all columns. They will keep their height when stacking. Optionally, subtract the header height to fill the first visible viewport.
Set a fixed height, and optionally subtr: Set a fixed height, and optionally subtract the header height to fill the first visible viewport. Alternatively, expand the height so the next section also fits the viewport, or on smaller pages to fill the viewport.
Set a fixed height. Alternatively, expan: Set a fixed height. Alternatively, expand the height so the next section also fits the viewport, or on smaller pages to fill the viewport.
Set a focal point to adjust the image fo: Set a focal point to adjust the image focus when cropping.
Set a large initial letter that drops be: Set a large initial letter that drops below the first line of the first paragraph.
Set a larger dropdown padding, show drop: Set a larger dropdown padding, show dropdowns in a full-width section called dropbar and display an icon to indicate dropdowns.
Set a parallax animation to move columns: Set a parallax animation to move columns with different heights until they justify at the bottom. Mind that this disables the vertical alignment of elements in the columns.
Set a sidebar width in percent and the c: Set a sidebar width in percent and the content column will adjust accordingly. The width will not go below the Sidebar's min-width, which you can set in the Style section.
Set a thematic break between paragraphs: Set a thematic break between paragraphs or give it no semantic meaning.
Set an additional transparent overlay to: Set an additional transparent overlay to soften the image or video.
Set an additional transparent overlay to soften the image.
Set an optional content width which does: Set an optional content width which doesn't affect the image if there is just one column.
Set an optional content width which doesn't affect the image.
Set how the module should align when the: Set how the module should align when the container is larger than its max-width.
Set how the widget should align when the: Set how the widget should align when the container is larger than its max-width.
Set light or dark color mode for text, b: Set light or dark color mode for text, buttons and controls if a sticky transparent navbar is displayed above.
Set light or dark color mode for text, buttons and controls.
Set light or dark color mode.
Set percentage change in lightness (Betw: Set percentage change in lightness (Between -100 and 100).
Set percentage change in saturation (Bet: Set percentage change in saturation (Between -100 and 100).
Set percentage change in the amount of g: Set percentage change in the amount of gamma correction (Between 0.01 and 10.0, where 1.0 applies no correction).
Set the animation easing. Zero transitio: Set the animation easing. Zero transitions at an even speed, a negative value starts off quickly while a positive value starts off slowly.
Set the autoplay interval in seconds.
Set the breakpoint from which grid items: Set the breakpoint from which grid items will align side by side.
Set the breakpoint from which grid items will stack.
Set the breakpoint from which the sideba: Set the breakpoint from which the sidebar and content will stack.
Set the column width for each breakpoint: Set the column width for each breakpoint. Mix fraction widths or combine fixed widths with the Expand value. If no value is selected, the column width of the next smaller screen size is applied. The combination of widths should always take the full width.
Set the device width from which the list: Set the device width from which the list columns should apply.
Set the device width from which the nav: Set the device width from which the nav columns should apply.
Set the device width from which the text: Set the device width from which the text columns should apply.
Set the dropbar width if it slides in fr: Set the dropbar width if it slides in from the left or right.

Set the duration for the Ken Burns effec: Set the duration for the Ken Burns effect in seconds.
Set the horizontal position of the eleme: Set the horizontal position of the element's bottom edge in pixels. A different unit like % or vw can also be entered.
Set the horizontal position of the element's left edge in pixels. A different unit like % or vw can also be entered.
Set the horizontal position of the element's right edge in pixels. A different unit like % or vw can also be entered.
Set the horizontal position of the element's top edge in pixels. A different unit like % or vw can also be entered.

Set the hover transition for a linked image. If the hover image is set, the transition takes place between the two images. If None is selected, the hover image fades in.
Set the initial background position, rel: Set the initial background position, relative to the page layer.
Set the initial background position, relative to the section layer.
Set the initial resolution at which to d: Set the initial resolution at which to display the map. 0 is fully zoomed out and 18 is at the highest resolution zoomed in. Alternatively, set the viewport to contain the given markers.
Set the item width for each breakpoint. Inherit refers to the item width of the next smaller screen size.
Set the level for the section heading or: Set the level for the section heading or give it no semantic meaning.
Set the logical operator for how the %po: Set the logical operator for how the %post_type% relate to the author. Choose between matching at least one term, all terms or none of the terms.
Set the logical operators for how the %p: Set the logical operators for how the %post_type% relate to %taxonomy_list% and author. Choose between matching at least one term, all terms or none of the terms.
Set the logical operators for how the ar: Set the logical operators for how the articles relate to category, tags and author. Choose between matching at least one term, all terms or none of the terms.
Set the margin between the countdown and: Set the margin between the countdown and the label text.
Set the margin between the overlay and t: Set the margin between the overlay and the slideshow container.
Set the maximum content width. Note: The: Set the maximum content width. Note: The section may already have a maximum width, which you cannot exceed.
Set the number of columns for the cart c: Set the number of columns for the cart cross-sell products.
Set the number of columns for the galler: Set the number of columns for the gallery thumbnails.
Set the number of grid columns for deskt: Set the number of grid columns for desktops and larger screens. On smaller viewports the columns will adapt automatically.
Set the number of grid columns for each: Set the number of grid columns for each breakpoint. Inherit refers to the number of columns on the next smaller screen size. Auto expands the columns to the width of their items filling the rows accordingly.
Set the number of grid columns for the f: Set the number of grid columns for the filters in a single dropdown.

Set the padding between sidebar and cont: Set the padding between sidebar and content.
Set the padding between the card's edge: Set the padding between the card's edge and its content.

Set the top margin. Note that the margin: Set the top margin. Note that the margin will only apply if the content field immediately follows another content field.
Set the type of tagged items.
Set the velocity in pixels per milliseco: Set the velocity in pixels per millisecond.
Set the vertical container padding to po: Set the vertical container padding to position the overlay.
Set the vertical margin. Note: The first: Set the vertical margin. Note: The first element's top margin and the last element's bottom margin are always removed. Define those in the grid settings instead.
Set the vertical margin. Note: The first grid's top margin and the last grid's bottom margin are always removed. Define those in the section settings instead.
Set the width and height for the content: Set the width and height for the content the link is linking to, i.e. image, video or iframe.
Set the width and height for the modal c: Set the width and height for the modal content, i.e. image, video or iframe.
Set the width and height in pixels (e.g. 600). Setting just one value preserves the original proportions. The image will be resized and cropped automatically.
Set the width and height in pixels. Sett: Set the width and height in pixels. Setting just one value preserves the original proportions. The image will be resized and cropped automatically.
Set the width in pixels. If no width is: Set the width in pixels. If no width is set, the map takes the full width. If both width and height are set, the map is responsive like an image. Additionally, the width can be used as a breakpoint. The map takes the full width, but below the breakpoint it will start to shrink preserving the aspect ratio.
Set the width of the dropbar content.
Set whether it's an ordered or unordered: Set whether it's an ordered or unordered list.
Setting just one value preserves the ori: Setting just one value preserves the original proportions. The image will be resized and cropped automatically, and where possible, high resolution images will be auto-generated.

Show a banner to inform your visitors of: Show a banner to inform your visitors of cookies used by your website. Choose between a simple notification that cookies are loaded or require a mandatory consent before loading cookies.

Show or hide the intro text.
Show or hide the reviews link.

Show system fields for single posts. Thi: Show system fields for single posts. This option does not apply to the blog.

Show the excerpt in the blog overview in: Show the excerpt in the blog overview instead of the post text.
Show the lowest price instead of the pri: Show the lowest price instead of the price range.

Show the overlay only on hover or when t: Show the overlay only on hover or when the slide becomes active.

Stack columns on small devices or enable: Stack columns on small devices or enable overflow scroll for the container.
Stick the column or its elements to the: Stick the column or its elements to the top of the viewport while scrolling down. They will stop being sticky when they reach the bottom of the containing column, row or section. Optionally, blend all elements with the page content.
Stick the navbar at the top of the viewp: Stick the navbar at the top of the viewport while scrolling or only when scrolling up.
Sticky section will be covered by the fo: Sticky section will be covered by the following section while scrolling. Reveal section by previous section.
Stretch the dropdown to the width of the: Stretch the dropdown to the width of the navbar or the navbar container.
Stretch the modal to the width of the na: Stretch the modal to the width of the navbar or the navbar container, or show a full modal window.
Stretch the panel to match the height of: Stretch the panel to match the height of the grid cell.
Subtitle: Subtitle
Tags are only loaded from the selected p: Tags are only loaded from the selected parent tag.
The animation starts and stops depending: The animation starts and stops depending on the element position in the viewport. Alternatively, use the position of a parent container.
The animation starts and stops depending on the section position in the viewport. Alternatively, for example for sticky sections, use the position of next section.
The animation starts when the element en: The animation starts when the element enters the viewport and ends when it leaves the viewport. Optionally, set a start and end offset, e.g. 100px, 50vh or 50vh + 50%. Percent relates to the element's height.

The animation starts when the element enters the viewport and ends when it leaves the viewport. Optionally, set a start and end offset, e.g. 100px, 50vh or 50vh + 50%. Percent relates to the target's height.
The animation starts when the row enters: The animation starts when the row enters the viewport and ends when it leaves the viewport. Optionally, set a start and end offset, e.g. 100px, 50vh or 50vh + 50%. Percent relates to the row's height.
The Apache module <code>mod_pagespeed</c: The Apache module mod_pagespeed can lead to display issues in the map element with OpenStreetMap.
The bar at the top pushes the content do: The bar at the top pushes the content down while the bar at the bottom is fixed above the content.
The builder is not available on this pag: The builder is not available on this page. It can only be used on pages, posts and categories.
The changes you made will be lost if you: The changes you made will be lost if you navigate away from this page.
The current PHP version %version% is out: The current PHP version %version% is outdated. Upgrade the installation, preferably to the latest PHP version.
The Default order will follow the order: The Default order will follow the order set by the brackets or fallback to the default files order set by the system.
The height can adapt to the height of th:
The height can adapt to the height of the viewport.

Note: Make sure no height is set in the section settings when using one of the viewport options.
The height will adapt automatically base:
The height will adapt automatically based on its content. Alternatively, the height can adapt to the height of the viewport.

Note: Make sure no height is set in the section settings when using one of the viewport options.
The list shows pages and is limited to 5: The list shows pages and is limited to 50. Use the search to find a specific page or search for a post of any post type to give it an individual layout.
The list shows uncategorized articles an: The list shows uncategorized articles and is limited to 50. Use the search to find a specific article or an article from another category to give it an individual layout.
The logo is placed automatically between: The logo is placed automatically between the items. Optionally, set the number of items after which the items are split.
The logo text will be used, if no logo i: The logo text will be used, if no logo image has been picked. If an image has been picked, it will be used as an aria-label attribute on the link.
The masonry effect creates a layout free: The masonry effect creates a layout free of gaps even if grid items have different heights.
The minimum stability of the theme updat: The minimum stability of the theme updates. Stable is recommended for production websites, Beta is only for testing new features and reporting issues.
The page has been updated by %modifiedBy: The page has been updated by %modifiedBy%. Discard your changes and reload?
The page your are currently editing has: The page your are currently editing has been updated by %modified_by%. Saving your changes will overwrite the previous changes. Do you want to save anyway or discard your changes and reload the page?
The parallax animation moves single grid: The parallax animation moves single grid columns at different speeds while scrolling. Define the vertical parallax offset in pixels.

The parallax animation moves single grid columns at different speeds while scrolling. Define the vertical parallax offset in pixels. Alternatively, move columns with different heights until they justify at the bottom.
The RSFirewall plugin corrupts the build: The RSFirewall plugin corrupts the builder content. Disable the feature Convert email addresses from plain text to images in the RSFirewall configuration.
The SEBLOD plugin causes the builder to: The SEBLOD plugin causes the builder to be unavailable. Disable the feature Hide Edit Icon in the SEBLOD configuration.
The slideshow always takes up full width:
The slideshow always takes up full width, and the height will adapt automatically based on the defined ratio. Alternatively, the height can adapt to the height of the viewport or to fill the available space in the column.

Note: Make sure no height is set in the section settings when using one of the viewport options.
The System debug mode generates too much: The System debug mode generates too much session data which can lead to unexpected behavior. Disable the debug mode.
The template is only assigned to %post_t: The template is only assigned to %post_types_lower% with the selected terms. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple terms.
The template is only assigned to %taxono: The template is only assigned to %taxonomies% if the selected terms are set in the URL. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple terms.
The template is only assigned to article: The template is only assigned to articles from the selected categories. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple categories.
The template is only assigned to articles with the selected tags. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple tags.
The template is only assigned to categor: The template is only assigned to categories if the selected tags are set in the menu item. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple tags.
The template is only assigned to contact: The template is only assigned to contacts from the selected categories. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple categories.
The template is only assigned to contacts with the selected tags. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple tags.
The template is only assigned to the sel: The template is only assigned to the selected %taxonomies%. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple %taxonomies%.
The template is only assigned to the selected categories. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple categories.
The template is only assigned to the selected languages.
The template is only assigned to the selected pages.
The template is only assigned to the vie: The template is only assigned to the view if the selected tags are set in the menu item. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple tags.
The width of the grid column that contai: The width of the grid column that contains the module.
The width of the grid column that contains the widget.
The YOOtheme API key, which enables <spa: The YOOtheme API key, which enables 1-click updates and access to the layout library, is missing. Create an API Key in your Account settings.
The YOOtheme Pro theme folder was rename: The YOOtheme Pro theme folder was renamed breaking essential functionality. Rename the theme folder back to yootheme.
This folder stores images that you downl: This folder stores images that you download when using layouts from the YOOtheme Pro library. It's located inside the Joomla images folder.
This is only used, if the thumbnail navi: This is only used, if the thumbnail navigation is set.
This layout includes a media file which: This layout includes a media file which needs to be downloaded to your website's media library. |||| This layout includes %smart_count% media files which need to be downloaded to your website's media library.
This option doesn't apply unless a URL h: This option doesn't apply unless a URL has been added to the item.
This option doesn't apply unless a URL has been added to the item. Only the item content will be linked.
This option is only used if the thumbnai: This option is only used if the thumbnail navigation is set.
Title: Title
title: title
Title styles differ in font-size but may: Title styles differ in font-size but may also come with a predefined color, size and font.
Top, bottom, left or right aligned image: Top, bottom, left or right aligned images can be attached to the panel edge. If the image is aligned to the left or right, it will also extend to cover the whole space.
Top, left or right aligned images can be: Top, left or right aligned images can be attached to the panel edge. If the image is aligned to the left or right, it will also extend to cover the whole space.
Transform the element into another eleme: Transform the element into another element while keeping its content and settings. Unused content and settings are removed. Transforming into a preset only keeps the content but adopts all preset settings.
Upload an optional background image that: Upload an optional background image that covers the page. It will be fixed while scrolling.
Use a numeric pagination or previous/nex: Use a numeric pagination or previous/next links to move between blog pages.
Use an optional minimum height to preven: Use an optional minimum height to prevent images from becoming smaller than the content on small devices.
Use an optional minimum height to prevent the slider from becoming smaller than its content on small devices.
Use an optional minimum height to prevent the slideshow from becoming smaller than its content on small devices.
Use the background color in combination: Use the background color in combination with blend modes, a transparent image or to fill the area if the image doesn't cover the whole page.
Use the background color in combination with blend modes, a transparent image or to fill the area, if the image doesn't cover the whole section.
Use the background color in combination with blend modes.
Users are only loaded from the selected: Users are only loaded from the selected roles. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple roles.
Users are only loaded from the selected user groups. Use the <kbd>shift</kbd> or <kbd>ctrl/cmd</kbd> key to select multiple user groups.
Using the Before and After Field Options: Using the Before and After Field Options
Using the Categories and Tags Field Opti: Using the Categories and Tags Field Options
Using the Content Length Field Option: Using the Content Length Field Option
Using the Date Format Field Option: Using the Date Format Field Option
Using the Search and Replace Field Optio: Using the Search and Replace Field Options
Using the WooCommerce Product Stock Elem: Using the WooCommerce Product Stock Element
Using the WooCommerce Related and Upsell: Using the WooCommerce Related and Upsell Products Elements
Using WordPress Category Order and Taxon: Using WordPress Category Order and Taxonomy Terms Order
Vertically align the elements in the col: Vertically align the elements in the column.
Vertically center the navigation and con: Vertically center the navigation and content.
WebP image format isn't supported. Enabl: WebP image format isn't supported. Enable WebP support in the GD extension.
When using cover mode, you need to set t: When using cover mode, you need to set the text color manually.
Width and height will be flipped accordi: Width and height will be flipped accordingly, if the image is in portrait or landscape format.
YOOtheme Pro is fully operational and re: YOOtheme Pro цалкам працаздольны і гатовы да старту.
YOOtheme Pro is not operational. All cri: YOOtheme Pro не працуе. Усе крытычныя праблемы павінны быць выпраўлены.
YOOtheme Pro is operational, but there a: YOOtheme Pro працуе, але ёсць праблемы, якія неабходна выправіць каб разблакаваць функцыі і павысіць прадукцыйнасць.
